'''yayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jurally|jurally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jurally|jurally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yayate|yayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yayatesher|yayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayatesherĂ«m|yayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yayatero|yayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yayateshĂ«|yayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayateshĂ«m|yayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyayatero|gokiyayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyayateshĂ«|gokiyayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayateshĂ«m|gokiyayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyayankerom|goyayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyayankeshĂ«|goyayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyayankeshĂ«m|goyayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyayankeya|goyayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yayaterom|yayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayatemu|yayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yayateya|yayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyayaterom|gokiyayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayatemu|gokiyayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyayateya|gokiyayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yayayate|yayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yayayatesher|yayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayayatesherĂ«m|yayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yayayatero|yayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yayayateshĂ«|yayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayayateshĂ«m|yayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyayayatero|gokiyayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyayayateshĂ«|gokiyayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayayateshĂ«m|gokiyayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyayayankerom|goyayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyayayankeshĂ«|goyayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyayayankeshĂ«m|goyayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyayayankeya|goyayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yayayaterom|yayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yayayatemu|yayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yayayateya|yayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyayayaterom|gokiyayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyayayatemu|gokiyayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyayayateya|gokiyayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠyĂŠte|yĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠyĂŠtesher|yĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠyĂŠtero|yĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠyĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠyĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠyĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠyĂŠterom|yĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠyĂŠtemu|yĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠyĂŠteya|yĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠyĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠyĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafyafte|yafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafyaftesher|yafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafyaftesherĂ«m|yafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafyaftero|yafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafyafteshĂ«|yafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafyafteshĂ«m|yafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafyaftero|gokiyafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafyafteshĂ«|gokiyafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafyafteshĂ«m|gokiyafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafyafnkerom|goyafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafyafnkeshĂ«|goyafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafyafnkeshĂ«m|goyafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafyafnkeya|goyafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafyafterom|yafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafyaftemu|yafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafyafteya|yafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafyafterom|gokiyafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafyaftemu|gokiyafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafyafteya|gokiyafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
